name: Arthas
description: A Tank who is proficient against melee Physical Attackers, slowing them.
title: The Lich King
info: Once the crown prince of Lordaeron, and protégé of Uther the Lightbringer, Arthas was corrupted by the cursed blade Frostmourne in a bid to save his people. Now he rules over the damned as the Lich King and all shall know his wrath.

Arthas.name: Death Coil
Arthas.description: Deals 164 (+4% per level) damage to target enemy.  Can be self-cast to heal for 262 (+4% per level) Health.

Arthas.name: Howling Blast
Arthas.description: Root enemies within the target area for 1.25 seconds and deals 68 (+4% per level) damage.

Arthas.name: Frozen Tempest
Arthas.description: Deal 36 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies and Slow them by 10% per second, stacking up to 40%. Heroes hit also have their Attack Speed reduced by 10% per second, stacking up to 40%. Frozen Tempest's effects last for 1.5 seconds.

Arthas.name: Army of the Dead
Arthas.description: Consume all charges to summon an equal number of Ghouls that lose Health over 20 seconds and attack for 20 (+4% per level) damage. Reactivate to sacrifice a ghoul, healing Arthas for 240 (+4% per level) Health. Stores up to 6 charges.  Whenever a nearby enemy Minion dies, reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by 1 second. Takedowns reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by 6 seconds.

Arthas.name: Summon Sindragosa
Arthas.description: Deals 230 (+4% per level) damage and Slows enemies by 60% for 4 seconds. Also disables Minions, Mercenaries, Monsters and Structures for 20 seconds.

Arthas.name: Frostmourne Hungers
Arthas.description: Activate to make Arthas's next Basic Attack strike immediately and deal 71 (+4% per level) bonus damage. Dealing damage restores 40 Mana.  Quest: Killing a Minion or hitting a Hero with Frostmourne Hungers permanently increases its bonus damage and Arthas's Basic Attack damage by 1.

1.name: Frost Presence
1.description: Increase the area of Howling Blast by 20%.  Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Howling Blast.  Reward: After Hitting 15 Heroes, Howling Blast's range is increased by 20% and it hits enemies in its path.  Reward: After Hitting 30 Heroes, Death Coil Slows Heroes hit by 50% for 0.75 seconds.

1.name: Borean Winds
1.description: After Frozen Tempest has been active for 2 seconds, Arthas gains 10% Movement Speed.  Passive: Frozen Tempest's Slowing effects last an additional 0.5 seconds and its Mana cost is reduced by 4 per second.

1.name: Rime
1.description: Every 5 seconds, gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%. Stores up to 3 charges.  Passive: Arthas heals for 24 (+4% per level) Health per second while Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned.

4.name: Shattered Armor
4.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Howling Blast have their Armor reduced by 15 for 4 seconds.

4.name: Icy Talons
4.description: Gain 3% Attack Speed for 2 seconds every time a Hero is damaged by Frozen Tempest, up to a maximum of 60%.

4.name: Frost Strike
4.description: Frostmourne Hungers deals an additional 115 (+4% per level) Spell Damage in an area and Slows enemy Heroes hit by 20% for 2 seconds.

7.name: Immortal Coil
7.description: Gain the healing effect of Death Coil even when used on enemies. If Death Coil is used on Arthas, it heals for an additional 75% bonus healing and its cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds.

7.name: Rune Tap
7.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack heals Arthas for 5% of his max Health.  Passive: Each stack of Frostmourne Hungers increases Arthas's maximum Health by 10.

7.name: Icebound Fortitude
7.description: Activate to gain 25 Armor and reduce the duration of Stuns, Slows, and Roots against Arthas by 75% for 3 seconds.  Each Hero Rooted by Howling Blast reduces the cooldown of this ability by 2 seconds.

10.name: Army of the Dead
10.description: Consume all charges to summon an equal number of Ghouls that lose Health over 20 seconds and attack for 20 (+4% per level) damage. Reactivate to sacrifice a ghoul, healing Arthas for 240 (+4% per level) Health. Stores up to 6 charges.  Whenever a nearby enemy Minion dies, reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by 1 second. Takedowns reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by 6 seconds.

10.name: Summon Sindragosa
10.description: Deals 230 (+4% per level) damage and Slows enemies by 60% for 4 seconds. Also disables Minions, Mercenaries, Monsters and Structures for 20 seconds.

13.name: Deathlord
13.description: If Death Coil is used on an enemy Hero, launch an additional Death Coil at a nearby enemy Hero.  Passive: Death Coil deals more damage the lower Arthas's current Health is, up to a maximum of 50% bonus damage.

13.name: Deathchill
13.description: Howling Blast's damage is increased by 2 for each stack of Frostmourne Hungers.  Howling Blast deals 100% additional damage and Roots for an additional 0.25 seconds against Heroes under 50% Health.

13.name: Biting Cold
13.description: Each second an enemy is damaged by Frozen Tempest, it deals 15% bonus damage, up to a 75% bonus.

16.name: Remorseless Winter
16.description: Enemy Heroes that remain within Frozen Tempest for 2.5 seconds are Rooted for 1.25 seconds and heal Arthas for 3% of his maximum Health. This effect has an 8 second cooldown per target.

16.name: Frostmourne Feeds
16.description: Reduce the cooldown of Frostmourne Hungers by 6 seconds. Arthas heals for 75% of the Basic Attack damage dealt by Frostmourne Hungers.

16.name: Anti-Magic Shell
16.description: Activate to make Arthas immune to Spell Damage for 4 seconds and heal Arthas for 25% of the damage prevented.

20.name: Legion of Northrend
20.description: Reduce Army of the Dead's charge cooldown by 5 seconds.  Each charge consumed spawns an additional Ghoul to attack nearby enemies. These Ghouls cannot be sacrificed.

20.name: Absolute Zero
20.description: Sindragosa flies twice as far. Enemy Heroes are Rooted for 2.5 seconds, and then Slowed by 60% for 4 seconds.

20.name: Death Pact
20.description: Instantly double your stacks of Frostmourne Hungers, but it no longer gains stacks from hitting Heroes or killing Minions.  Passive: Takedowns grant 2 stacks of Frostmourne Hungers.

20.name: Path of Frost
20.description: Activate to instantly mount with 10% additional Movement Speed. Taking damage does not dismount Arthas from this Mount. Lasts up to 5 seconds.  When Arthas dismounts, Slow all nearby enemies by 30% for 2 seconds and deal 66 (+4% per level) damage.

tooltipMarkup.ArthasAbsoluteZeroSummonSindragosaTalent: Sindragosa flies twice as far. Enemy Heroes are Rooted for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasSummonSindragosaHeroRoot,Duration" player="0"Precision="2"/></c> seconds, and then Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ArthasSummonSindragosaAbsoluteZeroSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasSummonSindragosaAbsoluteZeroSlow,Duration" player="0" precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasAntiMagicShellTalent: Activate to make Arthas immune to Spell Damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasAntiMagicShellCaster,Duration"/></c> seconds and heal Arthas for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of the damage prevented.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasArmyOfTheDead: Consume all charges to summon an equal number of Ghouls that lose Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Unit,ArthasArmyOfTheDeadGhoul,LifeMax/Unit,ArthasArmyOfTheDeadGhoul,LifeRegenRate" player="0"/></c> seconds and attack for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArthasArmyOfTheDeadGhoulWeaponDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. Reactivate to sacrifice a ghoul, healing Arthas for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArthasArmyOfTheDeadHeal,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health. Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ArthasArmyOfTheDead,Cost.Charge.CountMax"/></c> charges.<n/><n/>Whenever a nearby enemy Minion dies, reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ArthasArmyoftheDeadNPCDeathModifyChargeCooldown,Cost[0].ChargeTimeUse"precision="1"/></c> second. Takedowns reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ArthasArmyoftheDeadTakedownModifyChargeCooldown,Cost[0].ChargeTimeUse"precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasBitingColdFrozenTempestTalent: Each second an enemy is damaged by Frozen Tempest, it deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,ArthasFrozenTempestBitingColdTalentAccumulator,Scale*2"Precision="2"/>%</c> bonus damage, up to a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,ArthasFrozenTempestBitingColdTalentAccumulator,MaxAccumulation"/>%</c> bonus.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasBoreanWinds: After Frozen Tempest has been active for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasFrozenTempestBoreanWindsTalentCoolup,Duration"/></c> seconds, Arthas gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ArthasFrozenTempestBoreanWindsTalentBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Frozen Tempest's Slowing effects last an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ArthasBoreanWinds,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"precision="1"/></c> seconds and its Mana cost is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ArthasBoreanWinds,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> per second.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasDeathCoil: Deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArthasDeathCoilDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to target enemy.<n/><n/>Can be self-cast to heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArthasDeathCoilSelfCastCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasDeathPact: Instantly double your stacks of Frostmourne Hungers, but it no longer gains stacks from hitting Heroes or killing Minions.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Takedowns grant <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArthasFrostmourneHungersDeathPactTalentTakedownModifyTokens,Value"/></c> stacks of Frostmourne Hungers.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasDeathchill: Howling Blast's damage is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,ArthasDeathchillTalentDamageAccumulator,Scale"/></c> for each stack of Frostmourne Hungers. <n/><n/>Howling Blast deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ArthasHowlingBlastDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[DeathchillProc].Modifier"/>%</c> additional damage and Roots for an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArthasHowlingBlastDeathchillTalentApplyRoot,Duration-Behavior,ArthasHowlingBlastRoot,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds against Heroes under <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasDeathlord: If Death Coil is used on an enemy Hero, launch an additional Death Coil at a nearby enemy Hero.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Death Coil deals more damage the lower Arthas's current Health is, up to a maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,ArthasDeathlordTalentVitalAccumulator,MaxAccumulation"/>%</c> bonus damage.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasFrostPresenceHowlingBlastTalent: Increase the area of Howling Blast by %.Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Howling Blast.Reward: After Hitting Heroes, Howling Blast's range is increased by 20% and it hits enemies in its path.Reward: After Hitting Heroes, Death Coil Slows Heroes hit by % for seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasFrostStrikeFrostmourneHungersTalen: Frostmourne Hungers deals an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArthasFrostmourneHungersFrostStrikeTalentDamage,Amount"/></c> Spell Damage in an area and Slows enemy Heroes hit by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ArthasFrostmourneHungersFrostStrikeSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasFrostmourneHungersFrostStrikeSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasFrostmourneFeedsFrostmourneHungers: Reduce the cooldown of Frostmourne Hungers by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,ArthasMasteryFrostmourneFeedsFrostmourneHungers,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds. Arthas heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ArthasFrostmourneHungersDamage,LeechFraction[Life]"/>%</c> of the Basic Attack damage dealt by Frostmourne Hungers.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasFrostmourneHungers: Activate to make Arthas's next Basic Attack strike immediately and deal bonus damage. Dealing damage restores Mana.Quest: Killing a Minion or hitting a Hero with Frostmourne Hungers permanently increases its bonus damage and Arthas's Basic Attack damage by .
tooltipMarkup.ArthasFrozenTempest: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArthasFrozenTempestDamage,Amount*2"/></c> damage per second to nearby enemies and Slow them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Behavior,ArthasFrozenTempestSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100*2" player="0"/>%</c> per second, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ArthasFrozenTempestSlow,MaxStackCount*Behavior,ArthasFrozenTempestSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" player="0"/>%</c>. Heroes hit also have their Attack Speed reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,ArthasFrozenTempestAttackSpeedSlow,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor * 100 * 2" player="0"/>%</c> per second, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,ArthasFrozenTempestAttackSpeedSlow,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor * 100 * Behavior,ArthasFrozenTempestAttackSpeedSlow,MaxStackCount" player="0"/>%</c>. Frozen Tempest's effects last for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasFrozenTempestSlow,Duration" precision="1" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasHowlingBlast: Root enemies within the target area for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasHowlingBlastRoot,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds and deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArthasHowlingBlastDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasIceboundFortitudeTalent: Activate to gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasIceboundFortitudeCasterBehavior,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor and reduce the duration of Stuns, Slows, and Roots against Arthas by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasIceboundFortitudeCasterBehavior,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Each Hero Rooted by Howling Blast reduces the cooldown of this ability by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ArthasIceboundFortitudeModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasIcyTalons: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ArthasFrozenTempestIcyTalonsTalentAttackSpeedBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"precision="2"/>%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasFrozenTempestIcyTalonsTalentAttackSpeedBuff,Duration" precision="3"/></c> seconds every time a Hero is damaged by Frozen Tempest, up to a maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ArthasFrozenTempestIcyTalonsTalentAttackSpeedBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*Behavior,ArthasFrozenTempestIcyTalonsTalentAttackSpeedBuff,MaxStackCount" precision="3"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasImmortalCoilDeathCoilTalent: Gain the healing effect of Death Coil even when used on enemies. If Death Coil is used on Arthas, it heals for an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArthasDeathCoilSelfCastCreateHealer,MultiplicativeModifierArray[0].Modifier*100"Precision="2"/>%</c> bonus healing and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ArthasDeathCoilImmortalCoilTalentModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasLegionOfNorthrendArmyOfTheDeadTale: Reduce Army of the Dead's charge cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,ArthasMasteryLegionOfNorthrendArmyoftheDead,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Each charge consumed spawns an additional Ghoul to attack nearby enemies. These Ghouls cannot be sacrificed.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasPathofFrost: Activate to instantly mount with <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Behavior,ArthasPathofFrostTimedBehavior,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor-Behavior,Mounted,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor)"/>%</c> additional Movement Speed. Taking damage does not dismount Arthas from this Mount. Lasts up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasPathofFrostTimedBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>When Arthas dismounts, Slow all nearby enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ArthasPathofFrostSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasPathofFrostSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds and deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArthasPathofFrostDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasRemorselessWinterFrozenTempestTale: Enemy Heroes that remain within Frozen Tempest for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds are Rooted for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasFrozenTempestRemorselessWinterRoot,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds and heal Arthas for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ArthasFrozenTempestRemorselessWinterTalentHealer,RechargeVitalFraction"/>%</c> of his maximum Health. This effect has an <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasFrozenTempestRemorselessWinterImmunity,Duration"/></c> second cooldown per target.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasRime: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasRimeCharged,DamageResponse.Cost.Charge.TimeUse"/></c> seconds, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasRimeChargedArmorBehavior,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/></c> Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasRimeChargedArmorBehavior,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/>%</c>. Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasRimeCharged,DamageResponse.Cost.Charge.CountMax"/></c> charges.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Arthas heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArthasRimeHeal,RechargeVitalRate*(1/Behavior,ArthasRimeHealCarry,Period)"/></c> Health per second while Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasRuneTapTalent: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasRuneTapStacks,MaxStackCount"/>rd</c> Basic Attack heals Arthas for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArthasRuneTapHealer,RechargeVitalFraction*100"/>%</c> of his max Health.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Each stack of Frostmourne Hungers increases Arthas's maximum Health by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,ArthasFrostmourneHungersRuneTapTalentHealthAccumulator,Scale"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasShatteredArmor: Enemy Heroes hit by Howling Blast have their Armor reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,ArthasHowlingBlastShatteredArmor,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasHowlingBlastShatteredArmor,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArthasSummonSindragosa: Deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArthasSummonSindragosaDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Slows enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,ArthasSummonSindragosaHeroOrSummonSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" precision="1"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasSummonSindragosaHeroOrSummonSlow,Duration" player="0" precision="1"/></c> seconds. Also disables Minions, Mercenaries, Monsters and Structures for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArthasSummonSindragosaStructureDebuff,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
